name: multi-model-agents
description: AI Agent Swarm Lite 1.5.3-lite.1 returns verified workspace edit writeback previews for the optional coder compatibility tool.

interface.shortDescription: AI Agent Swarm Lite 1.5.3-lite.1: optional workspace edit returns verified written file previews.
interface.longDescription: AI Agent Swarm Lite 1.5.3-lite.1 is the simplified branch of AI Agent Swarm. Codex keeps planning, authorization, real file changes, real command execution, local project memory, and final decisions. Opus/Claude acts as an external reviewer/scorer for plan-review, diff-review, test-review, and final-review through the opus-reviewer Custom Agent calling multi_model_reviewer_score or multi_model_reviewer_findings. The Gemini tester workflow is intentionally removed. This release keeps Lite's default reviewer/scorer flow unchanged and improves the optional coder compatibility tool: multi_model_coder_workspace_edit now returns readback-verified and redacted written_files previews after real writes, while dry runs return proposed_files previews.
defaultPrompt: Use AI Agent Swarm Lite for this task: Codex remains the orchestrator and final decision maker; Opus/Claude may be used for engineering gate review and scoring.
